name: debug-find-root-cause
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>implement>verify>audit |
 scope: diff|repo |
 lens: feynman |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Scope in which the failure appears.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Stack traces, logs, failing tests, or repro commands.
